name: harvest
description: Track time, manage projects, and control invoices with Harvest — trusted by 70,000+ businesses

envVars.name: HARVEST_CLIENT_ID
envVars.description: Harvest OAuth2 Client ID (from your OAuth2 application in Harvest ID)

tools.name: List Accounts
tools.description: List all Harvest accounts the authenticated user can access. Call this first to get your Harvest-Account-Id for subsequent API calls.

historicalSummary.omitted: account auth policy and provider-specific fields

tools.name: Get Current User
tools.description: Get the authenticated user's Harvest profile (id, name, email, timezone, roles)

account_id.description: Harvest Account ID (get it from list_accounts)

tools.name: List Users
tools.description: List all active users in the Harvest account

account_id.description: Harvest Account ID (get it from list_accounts)

updated_since.description: Only return users updated after this ISO 8601 datetime

historicalSummary.omitted: user rates, avatars, and provider-specific payload fields

tools.name: List Time Entries
tools.description: List time entries (timesheets). Filter by user, project, client, or date range.

account_id.description: Harvest Account ID (get it from list_accounts)

is_running.description: Filter to only currently running timers

from.description: Start date (YYYY-MM-DD). Return entries with spent_date >= from.

to.description: End date (YYYY-MM-DD). Return entries with spent_date <= to.

updated_since.description: Only return entries updated after this ISO 8601 datetime

historicalSummary.omitted: notes, rates, invoice details, and provider-specific payload fields

tools.name: Get Time Entry
tools.description: Get details of a specific time entry by ID

account_id.description: Harvest Account ID (get it from list_accounts)

tools.name: Create Time Entry
tools.description: Create a new time entry (timesheet). Provide either hours or start/end times.

account_id.description: Harvest Account ID (get it from list_accounts)

user_id.description: User ID to log time for (defaults to authenticated user)

hours.description: Hours to log (e.g. 1.5). Use instead of started_time/ended_time.

started_time.description: Start time (hh:mmam/pm, e.g. 8:00am). Use with ended_time instead of hours.

ended_time.description: End time (hh:mmam/pm, e.g. 5:30pm). Use with started_time instead of hours.

external_reference.description: External reference object with id, group_id, account_id, permalink

tools.name: Update Time Entry
tools.description: Update an existing time entry

account_id.description: Harvest Account ID (get it from list_accounts)

tools.name: Delete Time Entry
tools.description: Delete a time entry. Only unlocked, non-billed entries can be deleted.

account_id.description: Harvest Account ID (get it from list_accounts)

tools.name: Stop Timer
tools.description: Stop a running timer for a time entry

account_id.description: Harvest Account ID (get it from list_accounts)

timeEntryId.description: Harvest time entry ID of the running timer

tools.name: Restart Timer
tools.description: Restart a stopped timer for a time entry

account_id.description: Harvest Account ID (get it from list_accounts)

tools.name: List Projects
tools.description: List all projects in the Harvest account

account_id.description: Harvest Account ID (get it from list_accounts)

updated_since.description: Only return projects updated after this ISO 8601 datetime

historicalSummary.omitted: project budgets, notes, rates, and provider-specific payload fields

tools.name: Get Project
tools.description: Get details of a specific project

account_id.description: Harvest Account ID (get it from list_accounts)

tools.name: List Tasks
tools.description: List all tasks available in the Harvest account

account_id.description: Harvest Account ID (get it from list_accounts)

updated_since.description: Only return tasks updated after this ISO 8601 datetime

historicalSummary.omitted: task rates and provider-specific payload fields

tools.name: List Project Task Assignments
tools.description: List all task assignments for a specific project (tasks billable to this project)

account_id.description: Harvest Account ID (get it from list_accounts)

updated_since.description: Only return task assignments updated after this ISO 8601 datetime

historicalSummary.omitted: task assignment rates and provider-specific payload fields

tools.name: List Clients
tools.description: List all clients in the Harvest account

account_id.description: Harvest Account ID (get it from list_accounts)

updated_since.description: Only return clients updated after this ISO 8601 datetime

historicalSummary.omitted: client addresses, statement keys, and provider-specific payload fields

tools.name: Get Client
tools.description: Get details of a specific client

account_id.description: Harvest Account ID (get it from list_accounts)

tools.name: List Invoices
tools.description: List all invoices. Filter by client, status, or date range.

account_id.description: Harvest Account ID (get it from list_accounts)

state.description: Filter by state: draft, open, paid, closed

updated_since.description: Only return invoices updated after this ISO 8601 datetime

historicalSummary.omitted: invoice notes, line items, and provider-specific payload fields

tools.name: Get Invoice
tools.description: Get details of a specific invoice including line items

account_id.description: Harvest Account ID (get it from list_accounts)

tools.name: Create Invoice
tools.description: Create a new invoice for a client

account_id.description: Harvest Account ID (get it from list_accounts)

currency.description: Invoice currency code (e.g. USD, EUR). Defaults to account currency.

line_items_import.description: Import time entries/expenses into line items: { project_ids: number[], time: { summary_type, from, to }, expenses: { summary_type, from, to, attach_receipt } }

line_items.description: Manual line items array: [{ kind, description, unit_price, quantity, taxed, taxed2 }]

tools.name: Update Invoice
tools.description: Update an existing invoice (subject, notes, dates, line items, state)

account_id.description: Harvest Account ID (get it from list_accounts)

tools.name: List Invoice Payments
tools.description: List all payments recorded for an invoice

account_id.description: Harvest Account ID (get it from list_accounts)

updated_since.description: Only return payments updated after this ISO 8601 datetime

historicalSummary.omitted: payment notes and provider-specific payload fields

tools.name: Create Invoice Payment
tools.description: Record a payment for an invoice

account_id.description: Harvest Account ID (get it from list_accounts)

paid_date.description: Payment date (YYYY-MM-DD, use instead of paid_at for date-only)

send_thank_you.description: Send a thank-you email to the client

tools.name: Time Report by Project
tools.description: Get a time report aggregated by project. Requires from and to date range.

account_id.description: Harvest Account ID (get it from list_accounts)

historicalSummary.omitted: report breakdown details and provider-specific payload fields

tools.name: Time Report by Team
tools.description: Get a time report aggregated by team member. Requires from and to date range.

account_id.description: Harvest Account ID (get it from list_accounts)

historicalSummary.omitted: team report details and provider-specific payload fields

tools.name: Time Report by Client
tools.description: Get a time report aggregated by client. Requires from and to date range.

account_id.description: Harvest Account ID (get it from list_accounts)

historicalSummary.omitted: client report details and provider-specific payload fields

tools.name: Time Report by Task
tools.description: Get a time report aggregated by task. Requires from and to date range.

account_id.description: Harvest Account ID (get it from list_accounts)

historicalSummary.omitted: task report details and provider-specific payload fields

tools.name: Invoice Report
tools.description: Get an invoiced time and expenses report. Requires from and to date range.

account_id.description: Harvest Account ID (get it from list_accounts)

historicalSummary.omitted: invoice report details and provider-specific payload fields

prompts.title: Log time for today
prompts.prompt: Log time entries for today. Show me my projects and tasks, then create time entries for the work I describe.

prompts.title: Show weekly timesheet
prompts.prompt: Show me my time entries for this week grouped by project. Calculate total hours per project and overall.

prompts.title: Create an invoice
prompts.prompt: Create a new invoice for a client. Import tracked time entries for the specified period and generate the invoice.

prompts.title: Check invoice status
prompts.prompt: Show me all open invoices with their amounts, due dates, and payment status. Flag any overdue invoices.

prompts.title: Team time report
prompts.prompt: Generate a time report for the team this month. Show hours logged per person, per project, and identify anyone who hasn't logged time.
